compiled_state.title: Implement check-artifact-versions.sh SessionStart hook
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh — a SessionStart hook that reads version stamps from 4 installed host-project artifacts, compares against the current plugin version, and emits a one-line notification when any artifact is stale.

### Implementation:
1. Read plugin version: python3 one-liner reading plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
2. Plugin source repo guard: if plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists in CWD, exit 0 silently
3. Fail-open guard: if plugin version unreadable, exit 0 silently
4. Cache check: read .claude/dso-artifact-check-cache (KEY=VALUE: VERSION=X, TIMESTAMP=N)
   - If VERSION matches plugin version AND (current_time - TIMESTAMP) < 86400: exit 0 (cache hit)
   - Otherwise: proceed to artifact check
5. Read stamps from 4 artifacts:
   - Shim (.claude/scripts/dso): grep for '# dso-version:' → extract version
   - Config (.claude/dso-config.conf): grep for '# dso-version:' → extract version
   - Pre-commit (.pre-commit-config.yaml): grep for '^x-dso-version:' → extract version
   - CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml): grep for '^x-dso-version:' → extract version
6. Compare each stamp against plugin version. Missing stamp = legacy artifact.
7. If any stale or legacy: print one-line notice listing which artifacts need updating, directing user to run `dso update-artifacts`
8. Write cache: VERSION=<plugin_version>, TIMESTAMP=<current_epoch> to .claude/dso-artifact-check-cache
9. Exit 0 always (fail-open)

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — all RED tests from Task 1 turn GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh
- [ ] All-current artifacts: script exits silently (no stdout)
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && OUT=$(cd "$T" && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh 2>/dev/null) && test -z "$OUT" && rm -rf "$T"
- [ ] Stale artifact: script outputs notification mentioning dso update-artifacts
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && sed -i.bak 's/dso-version:.*/dso-version: 0.0.0/' "$T/.claude/scripts/dso" && OUT=$(cd "$T" && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh 2>/dev/null) && echo "$OUT" | grep -q 'update-artifacts' && rm -rf "$T"
- [ ] Plugin source repo: exits silently when plugin.json present in CWD
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && OUT=$(bash plugins/dso/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh 2>/dev/null) && test -z "$OUT"

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.
